pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a release compatible with JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (0.7.x) do not support instrumenting classes compiled for JDK 11, causing runtime errors during test coverage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject removed from JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject classes are no longer part of the JDK module system in JDK 11, leading to ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation removed from JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation classes are no longer part of the JDK module system in JDK 11, leading to ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.
